chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1300 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for respondent No.6 & 7. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The counsel for petitioner does not press all other prayers of petition only press that his Revenue Appeal No.04/2024 is pending before respondent No.3, and seeks directions for deciding the said revenue appeal within shortage period of time. Learned AAG and counsel for the respondent No.6 & 7 concedes the same prayer of petitioner. Under the circumstances, instant petition is disposed of, with directions to the respondent No.3 to decide the Revenue Appeal stated above (if pending) within two months. The petition is disposed of as above. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
